inputs.label: Annual Income
inputs.businessContext: The policyholder's current annual after-tax income that needs replacement.

businessContext_i18n.en: The policyholder's current annual after-tax income that needs replacement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Poliçe sahibinin değiştirilmesi gereken mevcut yıllık net geliri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelles jährliches Nettoeinkommen des Versicherungsnehmers, das ersetzt werden muss.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu annuel net actuel du titulaire de la police à remplacer.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso anual actual después de impuestos del titular de la póliza que necesita ser reemplazado.

inputs.label: Years of Need
inputs.businessContext: Number of years the dependents will require income replacement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years the dependents will require income replacement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bağımlıların gelir ikamesine ihtiyaç duyacağı yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre, in denen die Angehörigen Einkommensersatz benötigen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années pendant lesquelles les personnes à charge auront besoin d'un remplacement de revenu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años que los dependientes requerirán reemplazo de ingresos.

inputs.label: Current Savings & Investments
inputs.businessContext: Total liquid assets that can be used toward future needs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total liquid assets that can be used toward future needs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki ihtiyaçlar için kullanılabilecek toplam likit varlıklar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe der liquiden Mittel, die für zukünftige Bedürfnisse verwendet werden können.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des actifs liquides pouvant être utilisés pour les besoins futurs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Activos líquidos totales que pueden utilizarse para necesidades futuras.

inputs.label: Outstanding Debts (e.g., mortgage, loans)
inputs.businessContext: Total debts that must be paid off upon death.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total debts that must be paid off upon death.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölüm halinde ödenmesi gereken toplam borçlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtschulden, die im Todesfall getilgt werden müssen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des dettes à rembourser au décès.
businessContext_i18n.es: Deudas totales que deben liquidarse al fallecer.

inputs.label: Future Education Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Estimated total cost for children's education.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated total cost for children's education.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çocukların eğitimi için tahmini toplam maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Gesamtkosten für die Ausbildung der Kinder.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total estimé pour l'éducation des enfants.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total estimado para la educación de los hijos.

inputs.label: Final Expenses (funeral, estate settlement)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated cost for funeral and estate settlement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated cost for funeral and estate settlement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cenaze ve miras tasfiyesi için tahmini maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Kosten für Beerdigung und Nachlassregelung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût estimé des funérailles et du règlement de la succession.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo estimado para el funeral y la liquidación del patrimonio.
